case_title: ANDREWS, GOLDSTEIN & WONG vs. ISIP, TERESA V. et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID.
